query_result.reasoning:

parsed_args.prompt: What was Starship R&D spending or research and development expense for Starship in Q1 2026 in {{spacex_s1}}?

tool_output.output:
Based on the provided text, the research and development (R&D) expense for the Starship program (within the Space segment) for Q1 2026 (the three months ended March 31, 2026) was **$930 million**. 

The text notes that this funding was dedicated to the next-generation Starship launch vehicle program and represents a $404 million (or 76.8%) increase compared to Q1 2025, driven by accelerated investments in Starship vehicle development, production, engineering, and launch facilities.
